title: MonitorOptions
description: Configuration options for a monitor controlling evaluation, notification, and recovery behavior

notify_no_data.description: Whether to send a notification when there is no data for the monitored metric

no_data_timeframe.description: The number of minutes after which the monitor reports no data (minimum 2x the evaluation timeframe)

require_full_window.description: Whether the monitor requires a full evaluation window of data before alerting

notify_audit.description: Whether to send notifications to auditors when the monitor is changed

renotify_interval.description: The number of minutes between re-notifications while the monitor remains in an alert state (0 to disable)

renotify_statuses.description: Monitor status types that trigger re-notification messages

escalation_message.description: The message to include with re-notification alerts instead of the main message

timeout_h.description: The number of hours after which an automatically resolving alert times out

evaluation_delay.description: The time in seconds to delay evaluation, used to ensure all data arrives before checking thresholds

new_group_delay.description: The number of seconds to delay notification for new monitor groups to allow transient issues to resolve

include_tags.description: Whether to include group scope tags in notification subject and body

silenced.description: Map of monitor scopes to Unix timestamps indicating when each scope's mute expires (0 for indefinite)

aggregation.description: Aggregation settings used for anomaly and outlier monitors

type.description: The type of aggregation function applied to the metric

metric.description: The metric name used in the aggregation

group_by.description: The tag key to group the aggregation by
